mapper.select: SELECT * FROM assessment_system WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assessment_system (name, description, template_file_key, need_approval, status, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{templateFileKey}, #{needApproval}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE assessment_system SET name=#{name}, description=#{description}, need_approval=#{needApproval}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE assessment_system SET template_file_key=#{templateFileKey} WHERE id=#{id}
